AFFECT [[3910876122537076124]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[15858012067550049461]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
    ~&7712201763518885&~ {
        ~&8399878573055752961&~: "custom-navigate-up"
        ~&7713561760591106&~: "Ctrl+Up"
	~&233726547792244&~: ~&15858012067550049461&~.~&473450369389093477&~
        ~&495331016591073787&~: ~&15858012067550049461&~.~&8399831271885298621&~()
}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
